title: botrychium obliquum f. pennsylvanicum
intro: Botrychium obliquum f. pennsylvanicum, also known as Pennsylvania grape fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Botrychium obliquum f. pennsylvanicum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and roots are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
